name: PupWiki Geo Pipeline Dataset Manifest
description: Generated offline from the XLSM. Pattern-derived URLs should be checked with --verify-remote before heavy runs.

folder_plan.Contents: Geofabrik US/state PBFs, poly files and updates
TIGER/Line legal boundaries and optional roads/water
GNIS domestic names and feature classes
folder_plan.Notes: Aliases, rural place names and outdoor names.
Upload heavy shards to R2; copy compact manifests to PupWiki.

folder_plan.Contents: Only compact manifests/search index inside PupWiki
folder_plan.Notes: Do not store full US shards in frontend repo.

datasets.Specific file/layer: All available national cartographic layers at 500k
datasets.Use in PupWiki: Primary boundary source for ETL/spatial joins; collect as canonical official boundary pack.
datasets.Notes: Use 500k for spatial join; do not ship heavy boundaries to browser.
